title: Helen Bauer: Bless Her
full_description: Helen is back and is struggling. She has spent the last year being forced to hang out with someone she doesn't like and who honestly does not like her. It's tense, it's uncomfortable, they won't leave. Helen Bauer has been spending some time with herself lately. Or more specifically, with Little Helen, her inner child — reconnecting with the tiny version of herself full of childhood hopes and dreams, in a show about learning to love yourself even when that feels next to impossible.
ai_summary: Bauer's most personal show yet — goaded by her therapist into reconnecting with her inner child, she opens the door on the serious stuff she's spent years avoiding. Behind the famously tall, German-engineered walls: a moving, frenetic, hilarious hour about anxiety, self-worth, and forgiving yourself.
